# terrible_community_general_decompress (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `src` (String) Remote absolute path for the file to decompress.

### Optional

- `dest` (String) The file name of the destination file where the compressed file is decompressed. If the destination file exists, it is truncated and overwritten. If not specified, the destination filename is derived from `src` by removing the compression format extension. For example, when `src` is `/path/to/file.txt.gz` and `format` is `gz`, `dest` is `/path/to/file.txt`. If the `src` file does not have an extension for the current `format`, the `dest` filename is made by appending `_decompressed` to the `src` filename. For instance, when `src` is `/path/to/file.myextension`, the (dest) filename is `/path/to/file.myextension_decompressed`.
- `format` (String) The type of compression to use to decompress.
- `remove` (Boolean) Remove original compressed file after decompression.
